subcodes.first_line: The very atoms have borne witness unto the Revealer of verses, yet the people speak that which hath consumed the hearts of the pure ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهدت الذرات لمنزل الایات ولکن القوم یتکلمون بما احترق به اکباد الاصفیاء و
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
